programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E2 - Ivory Wars
programme.desc: Elephant hunting has been banned in Kenya for 40 years. Organized gangs of armed poachers are still targeting elephants, illegally hunting them and selling their ivory tusks on the black market. Environmentalists and conservationists are sounding the alarm.

programme.title: E1 - Reef Wrecks of Bonaire
programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: E4 - Reef Wrecks of Roatan
programme.desc: This island of the coast of Honduras stands out as a vacation resort hot spot. But it’s not just the sun and sand that brings the tourists in droves. It’s actually a diver’s paradise with shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the the island.

programme.title: E5 - Mexico's Artificial Reefs
programme.desc: From opportunistic pirate ships, to well-armed navy vessels, Mexico’s Yucatan Peninsula is steeped in maritime history.

programme.title: E1 - Rhythm of the Bay
programme.desc: The Hudson Bay lowlands are part of North America’s largest wetland. Over 300,000 square kilometers of muskeg, a vast bogland as far as the eye can see characterized by water soaked peat, mosses and stunted trees. Once thought of as barren wasteland, it is now understood that these bogs are crucially important to life on earth. Globally, there is as much carbon dioxide held in wetlands as there is in the atmosphere. The peatland ecosystem is the most efficient carbon sink on the planet.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E3 - Lake Hunters
programme.desc: Sri Lanka’s lowlands are dotted with thousands of seemingly peaceful lakes, but don’t be fooled, this is the realm of the mugger crocodile. Muggers are hunters from day one. Watch as these supreme predators compete with each other in the fierce heat.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]

programme.title: Dans les hebdos
programme.desc: Avec des reportages des correspondants sur le terrain et des interviews de personnalités phares, retrouvez l'actualité mondiale qui bouge et qui change. Toute l'actualité internationale avec les décryptages des journalistes de France 24.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: La semaine de l'éco
programme.desc: Stéphanie Antoine, accompagnée de ses invités, analyse et décrypte les principaux faits de l'actualité économique internationale de la semaine. Ensemble, ils apportent un éclairage sur les tendances, les enjeux et les dynamiques qui influencent l'économie mondiale.

programme.title: ENTR
programme.desc: Un projet 100% numérique et accessible sur tous les réseaux sociaux, qui brasse des thèmes à destination des jeunes Européens.

programme.title: Le décryptage[Live]
programme.desc: L'analyse approfondie d'un fait d'actualité qui revient sur un événement marquant ou une thématique complexe pour en expliquer les enjeux, les causes et les conséquences.

programme.title: Le monde dans tous ses Etats
programme.desc: Un décryptage, en compagnie d'un(e) invité(e), de l'actualité politique et géopolitique d'un pays, à travers des reportages, des invités et des analyses des correspondants de france.tv et France 24.

programme.title: Outre-mer
programme.desc: Outre-mer part à la rencontre des habitants des îles d'outre-mer pour explorer leur quotidien. L'émission met en lumière leurs réalités, leurs défis et les problématiques locales, offrant un regard humain et authentique sur ces territoires souvent méconnus.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Sports[Live]
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]

E10 - Bowing Out
programme.desc: The chef is tasked with preparing an unusual dish for dinner. The guests stay up late and cause damage around the boat during a night of fun during docking, sending the deck team into a panic. Some of the on-board romances heat up while others fizzle out.

programme.title: E11 - Crossing Lines
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: E15 - Break- Ups And Shake-Ups
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.title: China News Live
programme.desc: China News Live: China News Live covers the hottest news of the day from Greater China and gives a complete picture of key issues including detailed background information and in-depth analysis of its impact from different perspectives.

programme.title: Phoenix Focus 2000
programme.desc: PHOENIX FOCUS: Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix Focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: Phoenix Evening Express

programme.title: E386
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E225
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: E2 - I Wish I Could Find Her

programme.desc: Will strives to be fully independent from the Banks family after his fallout with Lou. Ashley celebrates her 13th birthday.

programme.title: E2 - Ali Baba And The Forty Thieves
programme.desc: Ali Baba is a young Arabian girl who outsmarts the Great One and his forty thieves.

programme.title: E35 - The Broken Part
programme.desc: When Chowder breaks a part of a machine, Mung Daal sends him out to fetch a new one, but Chowder has trouble remembering what he has to get.

programme.title: E3 - The Fire Breather
programme.desc: After eating a bunch of fiery-hot peppers Chowder starts to breathe fire whenever he opens his mouth.

programme.title: E5 - Panini For President
programme.desc: Panini runs in an election in Marzipan City.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: TV Patrol Sabado[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.desc: LUCKY YOU! Open the briefcase and welcome the winnings. The Pambansang Host Luis Manzano is back, together with 20 lucky stars, as they play in all‑new original episodes of the luckiest season yet of Kapamilya Deal or No Deal!

programme.title: Pamilya Talk With Tita Jing S6
programme.desc: Be inspired and learn new things with Tita Jing as she talks about family and life

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: is the continuous story on how we can positively help shape the character of our young people, and eventually, the future of our nation. It is guiding the youth to listen to the past, discern today and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Bro. Eddie Classics
programme.desc: the flagship TV program of the Jesus Is Lord Church, is dedicated to fulfil its mandate of bringing all peoples to the Kingdom of the Living God through the saving, healing, delivering and transforming power of the Lord Jesus Christ.

programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. programme.title: Mmk[Live]
programme.desc: Dubbed as the longest-running drama anthology on Philippine TV with Charo Santos - Concio narrating real-life stories of ordinary people in this award-winning masterpiece that takes pride of its well-crafted storylines, excellent performances and topnotch production details.

programme.title: Get Sporty
programme.desc: The Junior Vets get sporty, helping horses at a polo match! Magda, the mare, is just back from injury – will she make it through the game? Barnaby, the rabbit, needs surgery, and a Burmese python has the sniffles. Plus, Johnny and Inel meet a naughty, food-stealing dog.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Types of Circuits
programme.desc: Making one lamp work is simple but getting a whole bunch of them to light up means Smorph needs to learn how different circuits work.

programme.title: Girls Who Code
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a former politician who is teaching girls to code, a fold-up kayak, headlights for running shoes,and a woman who invented a new way to keep food fresh.

programme.title: What's That Smell
programme.desc: Residents of a farming community in the USA have complained about a mysterious, terrible odor! It's up to the MeteoHeroes to find and eliminate the source of the stink. But that's not all. Penguin Peeguu detects a distress call from a group of chickens.

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: Repair Shoes
programme.desc: Today, the Grimwade family decides to repair their shoes, and Daddy proposes a visit to the cobblers. At 'The Cobblers', Heze hands over Mummy and Daddy's shoes. They are invited to go into the factory and see how the shoes get repaired.

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Play Together and Have Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to play together & have fun with Baby John & his friends! Baby John & Manny spend an exciting day at the pool, where they learn to follow all the safety procedures. Then, the two get a little competitive at the playground as they try to outdo each other building sandcastles & playing soccer. The fun continues as the boys set up their very own car wash after getting their electric cars all muddy!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E415 - Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: E106 - New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E104 - Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E222 - Sports Day
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the “tug of war”. Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: E515 - Big Rig Blaze
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E423 - Pottery
programme.desc: Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 2PM's Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: E20 - The Amazing Jalapeno
programme.desc: Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E8 - The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E28 - Grannies
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: E5 - Forest Elephants
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Congolese basin in Central Africa on a global adventure in search of a mysterious clearing created by forest elephants.

programme.title: E5 - Forest Elephants
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Congolese basin in Central Africa on a global adventure in search of a mysterious clearing created by forest elephants.

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E6 - Gordon Gets The Giggles
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: E32 - Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E33 - The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf:2025-2026
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E40 - Ernest And Celestine At The Museum
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E24 - Bad Habits
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion:2025-2026
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Spiked - Life After An Attack
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Kiruna - A City Relocates
programme.desc: A church that 'migrates” to a new location kilometers away. A key event in the relocation of the northern Swedish city of Kiruna. As iron ore mining encroaches on its territory, large parts of the city are being forced to make way.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E309 - Don't Go In There
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon a door they have never seen before in the Man's Nest and are determined to see what's behind it despite Ray telling them it's off limits. However, once they get inside, they must deal with the dangerous and bizarre consequences.

programme.title: E226 - iTake on Dingo
programme.desc: The Dingo channel has apparently been stealing ideas from iCarly, so Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to the Dingo studio to give the writers a piece of their mind.

programme.title: E103 - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: E274 - Big Bad Bubble Bass / Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors. // Squidward hosts a secret 'We Hate SpongeBob Club' at his house.

programme.title: E212 - The Incredible Shrinking Sponge / Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. // Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: E213 - The Getaway / Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. // When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E117
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E640
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: Aparajita, an artist with a past, and Rakshit, a reserved businessman wary of love, meet. Their relationship faces challenges, but friendship and hope may spark romance.

programme.title: E102
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E794
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5164
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Nobunaga hands over the clan to his son Nobutada (Koseki Yuta) and begins building a grand castle in Azuchi with his sights set on unifying the realm. Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)'s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

programme.title: Hidden Japan 'Gift From The Drift Ice'
programme.desc: Japan's natural beauty is astonishing in its richness - from the sea to the mountains, from deep valleys to tranquil lakes. How were the breathtaking landscapes that captivate us created? Now, it's time to set out on a journey to uncover the secrets hidden deep within the earth.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: An original sci-fi drama based on Ogawa Satoshi's novel, scripted by Yoshida Reiko. In 2125, Mars hosts 100,000 settlers under ISDA's control, as tension brews between authority and freedom. Lili-E1102 (Suri Lin), a visually impaired woman born on Mars, endures harsh training to reach Earth-for one reason: to meet Shiraishi Aoto (Suda Masaki), a young ISDA officer, and honor a secret promise. But when a catastrophic event derails her mission, it sparks a chain of schemes between Mars and Earth-leading to consequences far greater than anyone imagined.

programme.title: Yasujiro Ozu: Early Summer
programme.desc: A family chooses a match for their daughter Noriko, but she, surprisingly, has her own plans.

programme.title: Rifkin'S Festival
programme.desc: A retired film professor visits a film festival in hopes that a change of scenary can help him finish his novel.

programme.title: A MOVIE MOVIE DATE WITH EDWARD LAM - L'AUTRE #1 (PT 1)
programme.desc: Calling all fashion lovers! In this episode, Edward Lam matches Irma Vep with Dior and I.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: E13 - 大廚禮禮發現愛情鳥？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E13 - 浪漫告白夜
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

Women's Super League 2025/26 E101 -London City Lionesses vs Aston Villa
E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: E5 - Wild Wedding Party
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. programme.title: E5 - Wild Wedding Party
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: E6 - A Pirate Ship´s Last Jaunt
programme.desc: A pirate ship on a voyage. The Kogas - a retired pirate ship, is to start a new life as a noble restaurant in Berlin. But the journey to get there will be difficult, for the Kogas is docked in Lithuania. A risky and extremely difficult heavy transport over a distance of one thousand kilometres lies ahead. Because the Kogas weighs almost fifty tonnes, a special ship will take it across the Baltic Sea to Poland, and from there across the Oder and the Havel Canal to Berlin. The last journey of the Kogas - a huge logistical task where not everything will always go according to plan.

programme.title: E7 - Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: Dragons Forever
programme.desc: Hotshot lawyer is hired by a mysterious chemistry factory to dig up dirt on an inconvenient fishery seeking damaging court action. Sidekick Hung and professional crook Yuen swiftly sprint to Chan's aid. Ironically the gang finds their toughness softening in the face of two gorgeous ladies at the fishery. They inadvertently hit a center nerve of the chemical factory when they unmask the hideous facade of a narcotic syndicate.

programme.title: Yes, Madam!
programme.desc: Senior Police Inspector Ng is assigned to work with another lady inspector from Scotland Yard, to investigate the murder of an agent from the Commercial Crime Bureau of London, who was killed because of the evidence he has collected against a crime syndicate in Hong Kong. As the duo try to work around each other's polarized cultures and background, they kick and punch their way through the investigation, leading to 2 small time pickpockets Strepsil and Panadol, who had stolen the passport containing the evidence from the agent before he died. As the bumbling pickpockets try to dodge the assassins in hot pursuit, they eventually turn to the lady cops for help against the crime boss...
